submission title: L.A. firestorms: Uncovering how government failed the public
submission dek: After January’s catastrophic Eaton and Palisades fires killed 31 and leveled two communities, the L.A. Times exposed systemic failures in firefighting, evacuations and cleanup.
awardees: Alene Tchekmedyian, Paul Pringle, Tony Briscoe, Terry Castleman, Rebecca Ellis, Sean Greene, Noah Haggerty, Ian James, Dakota Smith, Hayley Smith

award: Kevin Carmody Award for Outstanding Investigative Reporting, Large
submission title: What the L.A. Wildfires Left Behind
awardees: Tony Briscoe, Noah Haggerty and Hayley Smith
